step2_verification.qa_pairs:
1. [SUPPORTED] Q: Does the document describe "Drokbk" as a tool, malware, or utility used BY the threat actor(s) in this report (not a defensive or victim tool)?
   A: Yes, the document describes "Drokbk" as a custom .NET implant used by the Mint Sandstorm subgroup to persist in target environments and deploy additional tools.
2. [SUPPORTED] Q: Does the document describe "Soldier" as a tool, malware, or utility used BY the threat actor(s) in this report (not a defensive or victim tool)?
   A: Yes, the document describes "Soldier" as a custom .NET backdoor used by the Mint Sandstorm subgroup to download and run additional tools and uninstall itself.
3. [SUPPORTED] Q: Does the document describe "CharmPower" as a tool, malware, or utility used BY the threat actor(s) in this report (not a defensive or victim tool)?
   A: Yes, the document describes "CharmPower" as a custom implant used by the Mint Sandstorm subgroup in targeted phishing campaigns.
